summary: Taskflow is a project management app for small teams. It lets users create projects, organise tasks on Kanban boards, track activity in real-time, and get AI-powered summaries of progress. It includes Stripe billing for paid plans and email notifications for team collaboration.

features.title: Kanban Task Board
features.description: Drag-and-drop task management with columns for each status. Move cards between To Do, In Progress, Review, and Done. Changes sync in real-time across all team members.

features.title: Project Dashboard
features.description: A home screen showing all your projects at a glance with progress indicators, recent activity, and key metrics like open tasks and overdue items.

features.title: Real-Time Updates
features.description: When a teammate creates a task, moves a card, or adds a comment, you see it instantly without refreshing. Powered by Supabase real-time subscriptions.

features.title: AI Project Summaries
features.description: Ask the AI to summarise a project's status, identify blockers, and suggest next steps. Useful for standup meetings and stakeholder updates.

features.title: Subscription Billing
features.description: Stripe-powered billing with free and paid tiers. Users can upgrade, downgrade, and manage payment methods from the settings page.

features.title: Authentication & Permissions
features.description: Secure login with email and password. Role-based access control ensures only project members can view or edit tasks, and only admins can delete projects.

flows.title: Task Management Flow
flows.description: How a task moves from creation to completion through the system.

steps.title: User creates a task on the board
steps.description: The TaskBoard component captures the task title, description, and priority from the user.

steps.title: Task is sent to the API
steps.description: The Tasks API validates the request, checks permissions, and saves the task to Supabase.

steps.title: AI suggests subtasks
steps.description: The AI assistant analyses the new task and suggests related subtasks or action items.

steps.title: Team sees it in real-time
steps.description: Supabase broadcasts the change, and every connected client's board updates instantly.

flows.title: Authentication Flow
flows.description: How users sign in and how their session is maintained.

steps.title: User enters credentials
steps.description: The login form validates the email format and password length before submitting.

steps.title: Auth API verifies identity
steps.description: The server checks credentials against Supabase Auth and generates a signed JWT token.

steps.title: Session is stored
steps.description: The JWT token is stored client-side. The useAuth hook provides the user object to all components.

backend.title: Stripe Payments
backend.description: Handles subscription billing, checkout sessions, and webhook events for payment processing.

backend.title: OpenAI Integration
backend.description: Powers AI features like project summaries and task suggestions using GPT models.

backend.title: Email Notifications
backend.description: Sends team invitations, task assignment alerts, and deadline reminder emails.

backend.title: Supabase Database
backend.description: Stores all project data, user accounts, and task history. Provides real-time subscriptions for live updates.

dataTypes.name: Project
dataTypes.description: A workspace containing tasks, members, and settings

dataTypes.name: Task
dataTypes.description: A work item with title, status, priority, and assignee

dataTypes.name: User
dataTypes.description: A person with name, email, role, and team membership

dataTypes.name: Team
dataTypes.description: A group of users sharing projects and billing

dataTypes.name: TaskStatus
dataTypes.description: The current state: To Do, In Progress, Review, or Done

dataTypes.name: Priority
dataTypes.description: Urgency level: Urgent, High, Medium, or Low
